summary: Comprehensive testing of cash flow unification features completed. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. POS cash sales, invoice payments, and expenses properly update cashier wallet in real-time. Daily report shows accurate wallet balance, Close Accounts uses wallet as expected cash, Fund Management displays real-time balances.
passed_tests: POS cash sale updates cashier wallet balance in real-time - PASSED
Credit sales (payment_method=Credit) do NOT update cashier wallet - PASSED
Invoice sale with immediate payment updates cashier wallet - PASSED
Expense recording deducts from cashier wallet - PASSED
Daily report shows correct cashier_wallet_balance - PASSED
Daily report has 'new_sales_today' field (not 'Today's Revenue') - PASSED
POS sales now appear in sales_log (unified logging) - PASSED
Fund Management page shows correct real-time cashier balance - PASSED
Dashboard shows 'New Sales Today' KPI label - PASSED
Daily Profit tab shows 'NEW SALES TODAY' label - PASSED
Close Accounts tab shows 'Expected Cash' from wallet balance - PASSED
Day Close creates closing record with expected_cash field - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Created test product TEST_CashFlowProduct and customer TEST_CashFlowCustomer for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash flow unification feature is fully functional. The cashier wallet is auto-created on first cash transaction. All cash operations (POS sales, invoice payments, expenses) correctly update the wallet. The day close uses wallet balance as expected cash. Dashboard and Daily Profit tabs both show 'New Sales Today' label.
